name: Late Night Cleaning Simulator
short_description: Take on the task of cleaning different businesses, but avoid breaking too many items in the buildings. Otherwise your boss will not be happy.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Late Night Cleaning Simulator, a fun and engaging cleaning game where you embark on a journey to spruce up various businesses around town. With Two exciting modes to choose from, there's something for every cleaning enthusiast.



Jobs

The Village: Explore a vibrant town and take on the task of cleaning eight unique businesses. As you go from business to business , you'll need to carefully clean without breaking any furniture. Immerse yourself in the charming stories of each business and its owners while ensuring everything is spotless.

The Lab: Your goal is simple: don't get fired! Work tirelessly to clean a business for four consecutive nights. Each night brings new challenges and increasing pressure to meet your employer's standards. Can you handle the stress and keep your job?

General Cleaning Mode: Test your cleaning skills and aim for the highest score as you clean eight different businesses. Compete against yourself or compare your score to your friends to see who can achieve the best cleaning performance. Keep an eye on every detail to maximize your score and earn bragging rights as the ultimate cleaner.

Dive into Late Night Cleaning Simulator and discover the joy of cleaning with a twist. Whether you're in it for the story, the challenge, or the competition, there's plenty of fun to be had in this unique cleaning game.
